_comment: Phase 1 canonical manifest — 7 pre-recorded MP3s per Voice System Implementation Guide Appendix A. Filenames match what's in the Supabase voice-assets bucket. The base URL is derived at runtime from VITE_SUPABASE_URL via voiceAssetUrl() in src/lib/config/voice.ts — do NOT hardcode project URLs here (addresses Alejandro's review on MR !103).

splash_hook.text: Hey there. ...I might have startled you. I'm your AI coach, and I'm here to help you build habits that actually stick. Tap below to get started.

pref_can_i_talk.text: Can I talk? I have something to share with you. I'd love to be able to speak with you throughout this experience.

mic_permission.text: I always want to give you the option to talk to me. If you allow your microphone, you can just speak and I'll listen. You can always change this later.

mic_granted.text: Got it. You can talk to me anytime now.

mic_denied.text: No problem. You can always type instead. And if you change your mind, you can enable the mic in settings anytime.

welcome_intro.text: Welcome. I am your AI coach. (See Voice Journey sheet row WELCOME-01 for full text.)

welcome_presence.text: One thing before we start... (See Voice Journey sheet row WELCOME-02 for full text.)
